description: Deferred Questions (Decisions tab) — displays non-blocking human-in-the-loop questions that were deferred during autonomous workflow execution. Users can review the AI's auto-decisions, approve them, or reject them (triggering targeted rework). Also covers the floating panel on the Active Dashboard and the badge counter on active run cards.

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Tab Registration & Navigation
assertions.precondition: Decisions tab is selected and component is still loading

target.label: Required element for Tab Registration & Navigation

assertions.description: Required element 1 for state Tab Registration & Navigation
assertions.precondition: Decisions tab is selected and component is still loading

target.label: Required element for Tab Registration & Navigation

assertions.description: Required element 2 for state Tab Registration & Navigation
assertions.precondition: Decisions tab is selected and component is still loading

target.label: Required element for Tab Registration & Navigation

groups.description: The Decisions tab appears in the RunDetailContent tab bar and is accessible via the ?tab=decisions URL parameter.
groups.name: Tab Registration & Navigation

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Empty State — No Deferred Questions
assertions.precondition: No deferred questions exist for this run

target.label: Required element for Empty State — No Deferred Questions

assertions.description: Required element 1 for state Empty State — No Deferred Questions
assertions.precondition: No deferred questions exist for this run

criteria.textContains: No deferred questions for this run

target.label: Required element for Empty State — No Deferred Questions

assertions.description: Required element 2 for state Empty State — No Deferred Questions
assertions.precondition: No deferred questions exist for this run

target.label: Required element for Empty State — No Deferred Questions

groups.description: When a workflow run has no deferred questions (either because blocking_approval was true, or confidence was always high enough to auto-approve silently), an empty state is displayed.
groups.name: Empty State — No Deferred Questions

groups.description: When questions exist, a header shows the title, status count badges, and a bulk approve button.

assertions.precondition: A pending deferred question exists

assertions.precondition: A pending deferred question exists

groups.description: Questions are displayed in three sections: Pending Review (with MessageSquareWarning icon), Rejected (with XCircle icon), and Approved (with CheckCircle2 icon). Each section only renders when it has questions.
groups.name: Question Grouping — Status Sections

assertions.precondition: Active dashboard is showing a running workflow with pending deferred questions

assertions.precondition: Active dashboard is showing a running workflow with pending deferred questions

groups.description: During active workflow execution, a floating panel appears in the bottom-right corner showing pending deferred questions. Only visible when pending questions exist and not dismissed.

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Floating Panel — Real-Time Events & Toasts
assertions.precondition: Active dashboard is showing a running workflow

assertions.precondition: Active dashboard is showing a running workflow

assertions.precondition: Active dashboard is showing a running workflow

target.label: Required element for Floating Panel — Real-Time Events & Toasts

groups.description: The floating panel subscribes to WebSocket events for live updates and shows toast notifications when new questions arrive.
groups.name: Floating Panel — Real-Time Events & Toasts

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Active Runs Bar — Pending Decisions Badge
assertions.precondition: Multiple active runs exist, at least one has pending deferred questions

target.label: Required element for Active Runs Bar — Pending Decisions Badge

assertions.description: Required element 1 for state Active Runs Bar — Pending Decisions Badge
assertions.precondition: Multiple active runs exist, at least one has pending deferred questions

target.label: Required element for Active Runs Bar — Pending Decisions Badge

assertions.description: Required element 2 for state Active Runs Bar — Pending Decisions Badge
assertions.precondition: Multiple active runs exist, at least one has pending deferred questions

target.label: Required element for Active Runs Bar — Pending Decisions Badge

groups.description: The CompactRunCard in the ActiveRunsBar shows an amber badge with the count of pending deferred questions, fetched via useEventTriggeredFetch.
groups.name: Active Runs Bar — Pending Decisions Badge

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Data Flow — Dual Source & Sync
assertions.precondition: Runner is connected and tab is active

target.label: Required element for Data Flow — Dual Source & Sync

assertions.description: Required element 1 for state Data Flow — Dual Source & Sync
assertions.precondition: Runner is connected and tab is active

target.label: Required element for Data Flow — Dual Source & Sync

groups.description: The Decisions tab fetches data from the runner (live) with fallback to the backend (synced). This ensures deferred questions are viewable even when the runner is offline.
groups.name: Data Flow — Dual Source & Sync
